news.summary: CarMax, Inc. (NYSE: KMX) is set to announce its fourth-quarter financial results on April 10, with analysts predicting earnings of 66 cents per share, a significant increase from the 32 cents per share reported last year. The company, headquartered in Richmond, Virginia, anticipates quarterly revenue to reach $5.97 billion, up from $5.63 billion in the same period the previous year. In the third quarter of 2024, CarMax exceeded expectations with its earnings and sales performance. Despite this, CarMax shares closed at $73.31 on Tuesday, showing a 0.6% decrease. For more detailed information, readers can refer to Benzinga Pro's Analyst Stock Ratings page for the latest insights and updates.
news.headline: CarMax (KMX) to report Q4 earnings on April 10, with projected EPS at 66 cents (up from 32 cents) and revenue at $5.97 billion (up from $5.63 billion in previous year). Shares fell 0.6% to $73.31.

news.summary: Stella-Jones Inc. (TSX: SJ) will host a conference call on Wednesday, May 7, 2025, at 8:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time to review its first-quarter results. This call is open to investors, analysts, and all interested parties. For live webcast access, visit https://meetings.lumiconnect.com/400-108-123-801 or dial (+1) 800 206-4400. The press release will be out before the market opens on the conference call day via Globe Newswire. Participants are advised to log in or dial in 15 minutes before the call. A web recording will be available following the meeting if you can't join at the specified time. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Stella-Jones to host first quarter results conference call on May 7, 2025, open to all. Live webcast available, call at (+1) 800 206-4400. Press release to be out before the call.

news.summary: Simply Good Foods Company reported financial results for the thirteen and twenty-six weeks ended March 1, 2025. Net sales for the second quarter were $359.7 million, with a net income of $36.7 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $68.0 million. Year-to-date net sales were $700.9 million, with a net income of $74.9 million and Adjusted EBITDA of $138.1 million. The company's outlook for fiscal year 2025 includes expecting net sales to increase 8.5% to 10.5%, and Adjusted EBITDA to increase 4% to 6%. The company's CFO announced his retirement, and a new CFO was appointed. The company aims to lead the nutritious snacking movement and expand its healthy lifestyle platform through innovation and growth opportunities.
news.headline: Simply Good Foods Company reported fiscal Q2 2025 results: Net sales $359.7M, net income $36.7M, adjusted EBITDA $68M, reaffirms FY 2025 outlook.

news.summary: A new dispensary in Middletown, Ohio is set to open soon, becoming the first in the area. Terrasana, a reputable cannabis retail brand in Ohio, will be launching this new location. This dispensary will serve the local community of Middletown and residents from Dayton to Cincinnati. The opening date is expected to be within the next few weeks. This development marks a significant addition to the cannabis retail landscape in the region.
news.headline: Terrasana to open Middletown's first cannabis dispensary, serving Dayton to Cincinnati. Opening soon in Ohio.

news.summary: In Brossard, Quebec, on April 9, 2025, G Mining Ventures Corp. (GMIN) disclosed the filing of a technical report compliant with National Instrument 43-101 Standards of Disclosure. Traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: GMIN) and over-the-counter markets (OTCQX: GMINF), the Corporation took this step for transparency. The report includes crucial data for stakeholders and investors to assess the Corporation's operations.
news.headline: G Mining Ventures files NI 43-101 report for Gurupi Gold Project in Brazil. TSX: GMIN, OTCQX: GMINF. Date: April 9, 2025.

news.summary: Chicago-based cybersecurity provider Keeper Security has surpassed over four million paid users worldwide as of April 9, 2025. The company is renowned for its zero-trust and zero-knowledge Privileged Access Management (PAM) software, ensuring the protection of users' cybersecurity on a global scale.
news.headline: Keeper Security has exceeded 4 million paid users globally due to increasing demand for cybersecurity solutions.

news.summary: According to a recent survey, over 50% of employees report experiencing Quiet Cracking, a condition characterized by lingering workplace dissatisfaction resulting in disengagement, subpar work output, and a heightened inclination to leave their jobs. The study was conducted in San Francisco on April 9, 2025 by TalentLMS, a renowned company specializing in employee management solutions.
news.headline: Survey finds over 50% of US employees experience Quiet Cracking, leading to disengagement and increased desire to quit.

news.summary: The early days of the Trump administration have seen a flurry of activities that signal forthcoming crypto regulations, with indications that cryptocurrencies may not be regulated as securities. However, critics have pointed out a lack of concrete changes in the form of new rules and guidance, with some labeling certain actions as mere theatrical maneuvers. The administration has taken steps to address the debanking issues faced by the crypto industry: repealing directives that hindered banks from dealing with cryptocurrencies, thus opening up banking to crypto. Additionally, various agencies have issued new guidance that could have significant impacts on crypto companies' access to banking services in the future. Notably, virtually every pending SEC case involving a cryptocurrency defendant has been dropped, suggesting a shift in enforcement priorities. The SEC has also ceased investigations into several crypto firms, indicating a changing perspective on the industry's regulatory landscape. Overall, these actions present a new approach to enforcing and regulating cryptocurrency in the United States under the Trump administration, with the potential to reshape the industry's interactions with traditional financial institutions.
news.headline: US gov't actions hint at new crypto rules; Trump admin dropped pending SEC cases; major banks now open to crypto. #regulation #cryptocurrency

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, The Simply Good Foods Company (Nasdaq: SMPL) shared financial results for the thirteen and twenty-six weeks concluded on March 1, 2025. The acquisition of Only What You Need, Inc. ("OWYN") was finalized on June 13, 2024. Therefore, the Company's performance for the thirteen and twenty-six weeks ended on February 24, 2024, does not include OWYN's results. In this update, "organic" or "legacy" Simply Good Foods refers to their business excluding OWYN.
news.headline: The Simply Good Foods Co. reports Q2 fiscal results, reaffirms FY 2025 outlook; acquired OWYN on June 13, 2024.

news.summary: Roots Corporation, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as ROOT, stated their plans for a Normal Course Issuer Bid for its Common Shares. The Toronto Stock Exchange has approved Roots' notice of intent to initiate this bid. As per the notice, Roots will repurchase a specified amount of Common Shares through the TSX or other Canadian trading systems. The purchased shares will adhere to TSX regulations and will subsequently be nullified. This move indicates Roots' strategic investment in their own stock.
news.headline: Roots plans to buy back Common Shares through a Normal Course Issuer Bid on TSX, following accepted notice.

news.summary: Neogen Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG) revealed its Q3 results for the period ending February 28, 2025, showcasing progress in integration and strong performance in the Food Safety segment. President and CEO John Adent highlighted improvements despite a dip in sample collection revenue. The company continues to focus on enhancing sample collection production and reach.
news.headline: Neogen Corp (NASDAQ: NEOG) reports Q3 2025 results with solid performance in Food Safety segment despite lower sample collection revenue. CEO optimistic about progress.

news.summary: Peloton Interactive, Inc. has recently assigned Charles Kirol as the Chief Operating Officer and shared updates regarding various shifts in leadership within the company based in New York.
news.headline: Peloton appoints Charles Kirol as COO and makes other leadership changes to drive growth.

news.summary: Bunge Global SA, listed on NYSE as BG, is set to reveal its quarterly financial results for the period ending March 31, 2025, on May 7, 2025. The disclosure will occur before the opening of the market. Following this, the management will conduct a conference call at 7:00 a.m. Central Time to analyze the outcomes. Interested individuals can view a slide presentation related to this on www.bunge.com. For those wanting to participate in the webcast, they can visit the "Investor Center" section of the company's website and navigate to "Events & Presentations" under "News & Events".

news.summary: In Lansing, Michigan, Neogen® Corporation (NASDAQ: NEOG), a prominent figure in food safety solutions, disclosed the departure of John Adent, the CEO and President after serving for eight years with the Company. Mr. Adent will uphold his current positions until a new successor is chosen. The Board of Directors at Neogen has established a special committee involving Board Chair Jim Borel, Thierry Bernard, and Jeff Capello to oversee the quest for the new leader.
news.headline: Neogen® CEO John Adent to step down after 8 years. Board forms search committee for successor.

news.summary: In Raleigh, N.C., Merz Aesthetics® has revealed Salma Hayek Pinault as the inaugural global brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME, an innovative micro-focused ultrasound platform for customized skin lifting and tightening. Recognized as the world's largest dedicated medical aesthetics business, Merz Aesthetics® is leading the way in redefining the landscape of medical aesthetics. Ultherapy PRIME aims to lift and sculpt the skin of the upper face, offering a non-invasive solution for individuals seeking personalized treatments. This platform represents a significant advancement in the field of aesthetics, providing cutting-edge technology and results.
news.headline: Salma Hayek Pinault named Merz Aesthetics' brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME, promising nonsurgical skin treatments.

news.summary: A global medical aesthetics business, Merz Aesthetics®, has appointed actress, director, and producer Salma Hayek Pinault as the inaugural global brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME. Revolutionizing medical aesthetics, Ultherapy PRIME offers personalized non-invasive skin lifting through an advanced micro-focused ultrasound platform. This technology, FDA-cleared for neck, under the chin, and eyebrow skin lifting, marks a significant shift in the field.
news.headline: Salma Hayek Pinault named as global brand ambassador for Ultherapy PRIME®, an advanced skin lifting treatment platform by Merz Aesthetics®.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 9, 2025, Canadian Premium Sand Inc. (TSXV: CPS) announced the completion of an updated Inferred Mineral Resource Report for its Wanipigow Sand Project. This was facilitated by core programs and bulk excavation carried out by CPS between 2022 and 2024.

news.headline: Osisko Gold Royalties Ltd reports strong Q1 2025 GEO deliveries and cash margin. Cash and debt positions as of March 31, 2025.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, APA Corporation (Nasdaq: APA) shared supplementary details on their first-quarter 2025 financial and operational performance. Actual results and the effects of the factors mentioned may fluctuate due to unaccounted variables. These positive developments signal a potential economic recovery and public health improvement in the near future.

news.summary: Today, on April 9, 2025, in Watertown, Massachusetts, Kymera Therapeutics, Inc. disclosed the addition of Noah Goodman, M.B.A., as the Chief Business Officer. This move from the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company with the stock symbol NASDAQ: KYMR, aims to leverage Goodman's extensive background in the life sciences sector. Kymera focuses on advancing a unique category of oral small molecule degrader medications for immunological ailments. In his new role, Goodman will oversee the company's business development strategies and operations, utilizing his diverse expertise to drive growth and partnerships.
news.headline: Kymera Therapeutics appoints Noah Goodman as Chief Business Officer. Mr. Goodman to lead business development with experience in life sciences industry.

news.summary: Lantronix Inc., a prominent provider of compute and connectivity solutions for IoT applications driving Edge AI Intelligence, has been recognized as the 8th Fastest-Growing Midsize Public Company in Orange County, California by the Orange County Business Journal. The rankings evaluated revenue growth over two years, specifically from 2022 to 2024. During this period, Lantronix achieved a remarkable 22% growth, with reported revenues reaching $160.3 million for the fiscal year ending on December 30, 2024.
news.headline: Lantronix ranked 8th on Orange County's list of fastest-growing midsize public companies with 22% revenue growth to $160.3 million in 2024.

Additionally, authorities have announced that 3 more individuals have recovered from the virus, making the total number of recoveries 25. This latest spike in cases has prompted local officials to consider implementing stricter social distancing measures to contain the spread of the virus. The city's healthcare system is reportedly under strain due to the increasing number of cases, with hospitals at 80% capacity. The public has been urged to continue following safety guidelines and precautions to help curb the further spread of COVID-19.

news.summary: New treatment regimen shows promise as potentially best-in-class with a short duration of treatment. Additionally, the regimen poses a low risk for drug-drug interactions and offers convenience with no effect from food intake. These qualities make it stand out in the medical field, with experts highlighting its positive attributes. This regimen has the potential to significantly impact the healthcare industry, with a growing number of individuals expected to benefit from its unique advantages.
news.headline: Atea Pharmaceuticals starts Phase 3 study with Bemnifosbuvir and Ruzasvir for HCV treatment, promising fast, safe, and convenient regimen.

news.summary: On April 14, 2025, Prospect Capital Corporation (NASDAQ: PSEC) will be hosting a webinar titled “Medium Term Notes – Senior Position and Attractive Income” for financial professionals. news.summary: The leading private flood insurer in the United States has reported a rise in flood risk for properties in Kentucky, Tennessee, and West Virginia. Neptune Flood's analysis reveals that as coverage levels continue to decrease, the vulnerability of properties to flooding is on the rise. This spells trouble for residents who are already faced with inadequate coverage, exacerbating the potential losses from flood-related events in these states.
news.headline: Neptune Flood Research Group analysis shows increasing flood risk in Kentucky, Tennessee & West Virginia as coverage declines.

This announcement marks a significant update for investors and stakeholders as they await the company's results for this quarter.

news.summary: In Fort Myers, Florida on April 9, 2025, Mayhugh Commercial Advisors celebrates its 50th anniversary as a key player in the commercial real estate sector. Established in 1975, the firm has been a prominent figure in Southwest Florida's commercial real estate market, showcasing a legacy of commitment, honesty, and achievements over the past five decades.

news.summary: Today, in Rochester, NY on April 9, 2025, the Rochester Fringe Festival Board of Directors revealed that ESL Federal Credit Union, based in Rochester, will now be the title sponsor of the 2025 ESL Rochester Fringe Festival. This announcement comes with news of almost a million attendees expected to participate in the festival.
news.headline: ESL Federal Credit Union named title sponsor for 2025 Rochester Fringe Festival, with nearly a million attendants.

news.summary: A significant amount of funding has been allocated to advance the clinical evaluation of STX-0712, as well as to expand other pipeline programs. The aim is to explore new applications for the company's unique CyTAC™ and TicTAC™ platforms. The Phase 1 trial of STX-0712 will focus on assessing the safety and initial antitumor effects of the innovative CCR2-CyTAC therapy in patients. This initiative displays a strong commitment to research and development in the medical field, with the potential to benefit numerous individuals.
news.headline: Solu Therapeutics secures $41M in funding, begins Phase 1 trial with STX-0712 for hematologic malignancies.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Post Holdings, Inc. disclosed intentions to shutter two cereal manufacturing plants owned by its subsidiary, Post Consumer Brands. The facilities located in Cobourg, Ontario, and Sparks, Nevada, are set to cease operations. Post, a consumer packaged goods company traded on NYSE under the symbol "Post," is making this move as part of its strategic restructuring initiative. This decision is expected to impact a significant number of employees and the local communities.
news.headline: Post Holdings to close 2 cereal manufacturing facilities in Cobourg, Ontario, and Sparks, Nevada as part of its business plans.

news.summary: Garmin recently unveiled the Varia™ Vue headlight camera that features a front-facing camera capturing high-definition video and automatically saving it when an incident is identified. This innovative device also includes a powerful headlight to illuminate the way. The announcement was made on April 9, 2025, in Olathe, Kansas. Garmin, traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol GRMN, introduced this advanced camera to enhance safety for users.
news.headline: Garmin unveils Varia Vue- a cycling headlight with a built-in 4K camera. Captures video & auto saves in case of incidents.

news.summary: CUBE, an industry leader in Automated Regulatory Intelligence (ARI) and Regulatory Change Management (RCM), has introduced a new product aimed at the expanding market. The company's latest offering, RegPlatform™ Intel, integrates top features from CUBE into a user-friendly solution. The announcement was made on April 9, 2025, in London. RegPlatform™ Intel provides a comprehensive solution that leverages CUBE's expertise. This launch signifies CUBE's commitment to innovation and meeting the needs of a growing market.
news.headline: CUBE launches RegPlatform™ Intel for mid-market financial services to enhance regulatory intelligence.

news.summary: In Toronto, Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. (TSX: TFPM, NYSE: TFPM) reported a record revenue of US$82.2 million in the first quarter of 2025. This was attributed to the quarterly metal sales of 28,761 gold equivalent ounces. The company expressed its satisfaction with the achievement, stating that they are on course to meet their 2025 GEOs guidance of 105,000 to 115,000 ounces. All financial figures are denominated in US dollars unless specified otherwise.
news.headline: Triple Flag saw record Q1 2025 revenue of $82.2M from 28,761 GEOs, aiming for 105,000 to 115,000 GEOs for the year.

news.summary: Ryder System, Inc. (NYSE: R) based in Miami, is a key player in the transportation and logistics sector. The company has been recognized for its commitment to innovation and efficiency, securing a spot on the prestigious Fortune list of “America’s Most Innovative Companies” in 2025. Through strategic investments totaling $1.7 billion, Ryder is dedicated to enhancing supply chain and transportation networks to drive operational excellence. This recognition underscores the company's leadership in the industry's ongoing evolution.
news.headline: Ryder named among "America's Most Innovative Companies" in 2025 by Fortune, highlighting $1.7B strategic investments.
